mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report_user_win_lose (`day`, `day_str`, `agent_id`, `user_account`, `super_agent_account`, `agent_attribution`, `bet_num`, `bet_amount`, `valid_bet_amount`, `run_water_correct`, `bet_win_lose`, `rebate_amount`, `activity_amount`, `already_use_amount`, `vip_amount`, `adjust_amount`, `repair_order_other_adjust`, `profit_and_loss`, `creator`, `updater`, `created_time`, `updated_time`) VALUES ( #{po.day}, #{po.dayStr}, #{po.agentId}, #{po.userAccount}, #{po.superAgentAccount}, #{po.agentAttribution}, #{po.betNum}, #{po.betAmount}, #{po.validBetAmount}, #{po.runWaterCorrect}, #{po.betWinLose}, #{po.rebateAmount}, #{po.activityAmount}, #{po.alreadyUseAmount}, #{po.vipAmount}, #{po.adjustAmount}, #{po.repairOrderOtherAdjust}, #{po.profitAndLoss}, null, null, #{po.createdTime}, #{po.updatedTime} )
mapper.update:
update report_user_win_lose
valid_bet_amount = valid_bet_amount + #{validBetAmount}, bet_win_lose = bet_win_lose + #{betWinLose},
valid_bet_amount = valid_bet_amount + #{validBetAmount} - #{lastValidBetAmount}, bet_win_lose = bet_win_lose + #{betWinLose} - #{lastBetWinLose},
bet_num = bet_num + 1, bet_amount = bet_amount + #{betAmountSettlement},
profit_and_loss = bet_win_lose + already_use_amount, updated_time = #{currentTime},
where id = #{id}

update report_user_win_lose
already_use_amount = already_use_amount + #{upAmount},
rebate_amount = rebate_amount + #{upAmount},
adjust_amount = adjust_amount + #{upAmount},
repair_order_other_adjust = repair_order_other_adjust + #{upAmount},
already_use_amount = already_use_amount + #{upAmount},
already_use_amount = already_use_amount + #{upAmount},
risk_amount = risk_amount + #{upAmount},
profit_and_loss = bet_win_lose + already_use_amount, updated_time = #{currentTime},
where id = #{id}

update report_user_win_lose
activity_amount = activity_amount + #{upAmount},
plat_adjust_amount = plat_adjust_amount + #{upAmount},
vip_amount = vip_amount + #{upAmount},
profit_and_loss = bet_win_lose + already_use_amount, updated_time = #{currentTime},
where id = #{id}

update report_user_win_lose
already_use_amount = already_use_amount + #{downAmount},
rebate_amount = rebate_amount + #{downAmount},
adjust_amount = adjust_amount + #{downAmount},
repair_order_other_adjust = repair_order_other_adjust + #{downAmount},
already_use_amount = already_use_amount + #{downAmount},
already_use_amount = already_use_amount + #{downAmount},
risk_amount = risk_amount + #{downAmount},
profit_and_loss = bet_win_lose + already_use_amount , updated_time = #{currentTime},
where id = #{id}

update report_user_win_lose
activity_amount = activity_amount + #{downAmount},
plat_adjust_amount = plat_adjust_amount + #{downAmount},
vip_amount = vip_amount + #{downAmount},
profit_and_loss = bet_win_lose + already_use_amount , updated_time = #{currentTime},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(bet_amount),0) as totalBetsAmount, IFNULL(SUM(bet_win_lose),0) as playerWinLose, IFNULL(SUM(valid_bet_amount),0) as validBetAmount, IFNULL(SUM(vip_amount),0) as vipAmount, IFNULL(SUM(already_use_amount),0) as alreadyUseAmount, IFNULL(SUM(adjust_amount),0) as adjustAmount, IFNULL(SUM(rebate_amount),0) as rebateAmount, IFNULL(SUM(activity_amount),0) as activityAmount, IFNULL( sum(bet_win_lose)+sum(already_use_amount)-sum(tips_amount)+sum(adjust_amount) ,0) as profitAndLoss, IFNULL(SUM(tips_amount),0) as tipsAmount, IFNULL(SUM(risk_amount),0) as riskAmount, IFNULL(SUM( plat_adjust_amount),0) AS platAdjustAmount
FROM `report_user_win_lose` WHERE user_account = #{userAccount} AND site_code = #{siteCode}

SELECT day_millis as dayMillisTime, count(distinct if(bet_num > 0, user_id, null)) betMemNum, IFNULL(sum(a.bet_num),0) betNum, IFNULL(sum(a.bet_amount),0) betAmount, IFNULL(sum(a.valid_bet_amount),0) validBetAmount, IFNULL(sum(a.run_water_correct),0) runWaterCorrect, IFNULL(sum(a.bet_win_lose),0) betWinLose, IFNULL(sum(a.activity_amount),0) activityAmount, IFNULL(sum(a.vip_amount),0) vipAmount, IFNULL(sum(a.adjust_amount),0) adjustAmount, IFNULL(SUM(a.repair_order_other_adjust), 0) repairOrderOtherAdjust, IFNULL(sum(a.already_use_amount),0) alreadyUseAmount, IFNULL(sum(a.rebate_amount),0) rebateAmount, IFNULL(sum(a.tips_amount),0) tipsAmount, IFNULL(sum(a.plat_adjust_amount),0) platAdjustAmount, a.main_currency mainCurrency FROM report_user_win_lose a
a.site_code = #{siteCode}
AND a.day_hour_millis >= #{vo.startDay}
AND a.day_hour_millis <= #{vo.endDay}
AND a.main_currency = #{vo.mainCurrency}
GROUP BY day_millis,main_currency
ORDER BY betNum asc
ORDER BY betNum desc
ORDER BY betAmount asc
ORDER BY betAmount desc
ORDER BY validBetAmount asc
ORDER BY validBetAmount desc
ORDER BY runWaterCorrect asc
ORDER BY runWaterCorrect desc
ORDER BY betWinLose asc
ORDER BY betWinLose desc
ORDER BY rebateAmount asc
ORDER BY rebateAmount desc
ORDER BY activityAmount asc
ORDER BY activityAmount desc
ORDER BY vipAmount asc
ORDER BY vipAmount desc
ORDER BY adjustAmount asc
ORDER BY adjustAmount desc
ORDER BY repairOrderOtherAdjust asc
ORDER BY repairOrderOtherAdjust desc
ORDER BY alreadyUseAmount asc
ORDER BY alreadyUseAmount desc
ORDER BY betMemNum asc
ORDER BY betMemNum desc
ORDER BY day_millis DESC , main_currency desc
